name: remote-work
description: Remote-work experience narrative. Tight complete-clause gold spans. Probes benefit-vs-cost adjacency (flexibility vs blurred boundaries) and an understated visibility/career line.
transcriptContent: Working from home, I save almost two hours a day not commuting, which I pour back into my kids. The downside is my laptop is always right there, so I end up checking email at ten at night. I've noticed I'm out of the loop on the decisions that get made in the hallway. Some days I don't speak to another adult until my partner gets home. Still, I'd take this over the open-plan office any day.

goldCodings.codedText: I save almost two hours a day not commuting
I end up checking email at ten at night
I'm out of the loop on the decisions that get made in the hallway
I don't speak to another adult until my partner gets home
